reasoning: The control AC-17 (2) focuses on protecting the confidentiality and integrity of remote access using encryption. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network traffic is restricted and encrypted. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that only authorized traffic is allowed. Enabling TLS for Ingress ensures that data in transit is encrypted. Additionally, ensuring that the API server encryption is enabled helps protect the confidentiality and integrity of data accessed via the API.
title: Remote Access | Protection of Confidentiality and Integrity Using Encryption
